summary: Comprehensive testing of EuroAdria Admin Panel PDF Generator feature. All backend API tests (9/9) and frontend UI tests passed. PDF generation works correctly with proper validation, reset functionality, and download triggering.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts component sizing issue, non-blocking (known from iteration_15)

critical_code_review_comments: PDF Generator implementation is complete and working correctly
Backend uses reportlab and BeautifulSoup for HTML-to-PDF conversion
Frontend validation correctly disables generate button when title or content is empty
Reset button properly clears all form fields
WYSIWYG editor toolbar has all required formatting options (Bold, Italic, H1-H3, Lists, Quote, Link)
PDF includes EuroAdria branding with logo, gold accents, header/footer
Backend gracefully handles empty title by using 'Dokument' as default
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Generator feature fully tested and working. Located under 'Inhalte' group in admin sidebar (nav-pdfgenerator). Uses WYSIWYG editor with contenteditable div. Backend endpoint POST /api/admin/generate-pdf returns valid PDF with EuroAdria branding. Frontend validation prevents generation without title and content.

frontend_ui_tests: Navigate to PDF Generator tab - PASS
PDF Generator page renders with all elements - PASS
Title input present and functional - PASS
Subtitle input present and functional - PASS
WYSIWYG editor present and functional - PASS
Generate button disabled when fields empty - PASS
Generate button enabled when title+content filled - PASS
PDF download triggered on generate click - PASS
Success message displayed after generation - PASS
Reset button clears all fields - PASS
